markets.question: Will Trump and Putin meet next in another EU country?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the location of the next meeting between Donald Trump and Vladimir Putin between September 30 and June 30, 2026, 11:59 PM ET.

This market will resolve to "No meeting by June 30" if no qualifying meeting occurs during this market's timeframe.

A meeting is defined as any encounter where Putin and Trump are all present and interact with each other in person.

An exchange of words, handshake, direct conversation, or other clear personal interaction between the named individuals will qualify as a meeting. Merely standing in proximity, making eye contact, or being present in the same room or event without direct interaction will not qualify.

For this market, Gulf states are defined as the six members of the Gulf Cooperation Council (Bahrain, Kuwait, Oman, Qatar, Saudi Arabia, United Arab Emirates).

The primary resolution source for this market will be a consensus of credible reporting.

markets.question: Will T1 make a roster change before July?

As of market creation the active roster consists of the following players: Doran, Oner, Faker, Peyz, and Keria. Name changes or aliases referring to the same player do not qualify as roster changes.

For the purpose of this market, "roster change" refers to any official signing, transfer, benching to inactive/reserve, release, retirement, or departure of a player from the active lineup. This includes adding new players (transfers, free agent signings, or loans), removing players (to inactive, free agency, or other teams), or any change resulting in a different active roster.

markets.question: Will LeBron James buy the Seattle Seahawks?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to the named individual who is publicly announced as having agreed to purchase the Seattle Seahawks by September 9, 2026, at 11:59 PM ET (the beginning of the 2026 NFL regular season). 

If no sale is announced before this time, this market will resolve to "Other".

For the purposes of this market, an announcement must confirm that the Paul G. Allen estate (also known as Vulcan LLC) has reached a binding agreement to sell a majority interest in the team. Minority sales will not be considered.

If a sale is announced to an individual that is not listed, this market will resolve to “Other”.

If two or more listed individuals are announced as joint owners or part of the same ownership group, this market will resolve to the individual announced as the controlling owner.

If two or more listed individuals are announced as the controlling owners, this market will resolve to the individual whose last name comes first alphabetically.

For the purposes of this market, the completion (closing) of the sale is not required.

The primary resolution source will be official statements from the National Football League or the Seattle Seahawks. A consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

Recent late-April reports of interest from Mark Zuckerberg and Tim Cook elevated their shares to 3.5% and 4.5%, citing tech synergies and wealth, while LeBron James' 5.8% stems from his sports ownership ambitions despite lacking local NFL ties. The fragmented field underscores no binding agreements yet, with "Other" dominant amid hidden bidder dynamics and a September announcement deadline.

markets.question: Will the median home value in the DC Metro area be between $566,000 and $572,000 on May 31?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the median home value for all property types in the Washington, D.C. Metro area on May 31, 2026.

If the reported value falls exactly between two brackets, then this market will resolve to the higher range bracket.

The resolution source will be official data from the Parcl Labs Sales Price Index for the Washington, D.C. Metro area (Parcl_ID: 2900475). This market will resolve to “Sabalenka” if Aryna Sabalenka wins the first set. It will resolve to “Cirstea” if Sorana Cirstea wins the first set.

Sorana Cirstea, ranked around No. 26 and on her farewell 2026 tour, advanced comfortably 6-2, 6-0 over Tatjana Maria despite a recent leg injury withdrawal in Rouen, but trails 2-1 in head-to-heads, including a straight-sets defeat to Sabalenka in Brisbane earlier this year. This positioning stems from PL's current status as the Senate's largest party (16 seats) and opposition momentum boosted by the April 29 rejection of President Lula's Supreme Court nominee Jorge Messias, which garnered 42 no votes and energized right-leaning voters. MDB trails with leads in São Paulo (Simone Tebet) and Rio Grande do Sul, while UNIÃO shows strength in Ceará (Capitão Wagner) and PSD in Minas Gerais (Carlos Viana), but aggregators project PL comfortably ahead amid tight presidential polling between Lula and Flávio Bolsonaro (PL). eventMetadata.context_description: Manchester United hold third place in the Premier League table, pushing for Champions League qualification, but arrive at Stadium of Light hampered by a defensive injury crisis: Matthijs de Ligt sidelined long-term with back issues, Lisandro Martínez doubtful, Leny Yoro nursing a knock, Patrick Dorgu out with hamstring problems, and Harry Maguire's recent suspension history adding uncertainty to the backline. Sunderland, mid-table after 12 wins from 32 matches, stunned Tottenham 1-0 at home on April 12 but suffered a humiliating 0-5 home loss to Nottingham Forest last weekend and a 3-4 defeat at Aston Villa prior, testing home form against United's superior quality despite their earlier 2-0 league win this season. markets.question: Will the highest temperature in Istanbul be 20°C on May 9?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to the temperature range that contains the highest temperature recorded by NOAA at the Istanbul Airport in degrees Celsius on 9 May '26.

The resolution source for this market will be information from NOAA, specifically the highest reading under the "Temp" column on the specified date once information is finalized for all hours on that date, available here: https://www.weather.gov/wrh/timeseries?site=LTFM

To toggle between Fahrenheit and Celsius, click the "Switch to Metric Units" button until the relevant table displays °C.

This market can not resolve to "Yes" until data for this date has been finalized.

The resolution source for this market measures temperatures to whole degrees Celsius (eg, 9°C). Thus, this is the level of precision that will be used when resolving the market.

Any revisions to temperatures recorded after data is finalized for this market's timeframe will not be considered for this market's resolution.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus on Polymarket favors 22°C at 34% implied probability for Istanbul's highest temperature on May 9, closely trailed by 21°C (25%) and 23°C (21%), reflecting tight clustering in latest forecast models amid inherent short-term uncertainty. The European Centre for Medium-Range Weather Forecasts (ECMWF) and Global Forecast System (GFS) ensembles project afternoon maxima around 22°C under a building high-pressure ridge over the eastern Mediterranean, fostering mild advection from the Black Sea; however, discrepancies arise from variable low-level moisture and cloud cover, potentially capping peaks at 21°C or allowing slight diurnal heating to 23°C via urban heat island effects in the city center. Typical May climatology averages 21°C highs, with Turkish State Meteorological Service updates expected through the day to refine trajectories before resolution based on official station observations.

events.title: Counter-Strike: largadosypelados vs Turma do Pagode (BO3) - Odyssey Cup Brazil Playoffs
events.description:
This market refers to the Counter-Strike Quarterfinal 2 match between largadosypelados and Turma do Pagode in the Odyssey Cup Brazil Playoffs, initially scheduled for May 8 at 5:30PM ET.

This market will resolve to "largadosypelados" if largadosypelados win the match against Turma do Pagode.

This market will resolve to "Turma do Pagode" if Turma do Pagode win the match against largadosypelados.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to the team who wins. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://hltv.org. However, if https://hltv.org has not published final results within 2 hours after the event’s conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead including video evidence.

In cases where a team’s listed name includes minor discrepancies from the resolution source, this market will resolve based on the underlying real-world match rather than exact name matching. Recognizable abbreviations, alternate or erroneous spellings, sponsor tags, affiliate or academy designations, regional identifiers, and minor formatting differences will be treated as referring to the same team, provided the intended team can be clearly and uniquely identified within the relevant competition. If a listed team name has no reasonable connection to any participating team, or if it matches or could reasonably refer to another team in the same competition such that the intended team cannot be unambiguously determined, this market will resolve 50-50.

eventMetadata.context_description: LargadosyPelados face Turma do Pagode in the Odyssey Cup Brazil 2026 playoffs quarterfinals, a best-of-three CS2 matchup after both teams advanced with 3-1 Swiss stage records—LP in 4th on +4 round differential, TdP in 5th at even. LP impressed with a 13-4 rout of Crashers on Ancient and 2-1 comeback over Fluxo, bolstered by AWPer zmb (1.13 rating) and rifler divine amid 54.5% win rate last three months. TdP grinded close 13-11 wins on Ancient and Anubis, plus 2-1 over Bounty Hunters, powered by veteran felps and entry WOOD7 following a 2-0 CCT win yesterday. Stable rosters and no reported changes set up a tight Brazilian derby.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus heavily favors the Partido Liberal (PL) to secure the most seats among the 27 up for election in Brazil's Senate on October 4, 2026, reflecting strong performances in recent Genial/Quaest polls across major states like Rio de Janeiro (Cláudio Castro and Felipe Curi leading), Paraná (Filipe Barros competitive), and Pernambuco (Mendonça Filho and Anderson Ferreira viable). This positioning stems from PL's current status as the Senate's largest party (16 seats) and opposition momentum boosted by the April 29 rejection of President Lula's Supreme Court nominee Jorge Messias, which garnered 42 no votes and energized right-leaning voters. MDB trails with leads in São Paulo (Simone Tebet) and Rio Grande do Sul, while UNIÃO shows strength in Ceará (Capitão Wagner) and PSD in Minas Gerais (Carlos Viana), but aggregators project PL comfortably ahead amid tight presidential polling between Lula and Flávio Bolsonaro (PL). Late shifts remain possible via endorsements or scandals before the vote.

If the match is canceled (not played at all for any reason), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's match forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match ends due to the clinching game being forfeited this will count as a completed match.

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://gol.gg/esports/home. However, if https://gol.gg/esports/home has not published final results within 2 hours after the event’s conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead including video evidence.

events.title: LoL: Movistar KOI vs Karmine Corp (BO3) - LEC Regular Season
events.description:
This market refers to the LoL match between Movistar KOI and Karmine Corp in the LEC Regular Season, initially scheduled for May 9 at 1:00PM ET.

This market will resolve to "Movistar KOI" if Movistar KOI win the match against Karmine Corp.

This market will resolve to "Karmine Corp" if Karmine Corp win the match against Movistar KOI.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to the team who wins. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://gol.gg/esports/home. However, if https://gol.gg/esports/home has not published final results within 2 hours after the event’s conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead including video evidence.

In cases where a team’s listed name includes minor discrepancies from the resolution source, this market will resolve based on the underlying real-world match rather than exact name matching. Recognizable abbreviations, alternate or erroneous spellings, sponsor tags, affiliate or academy designations, regional identifiers, and minor formatting differences will be treated as referring to the same team, provided the intended team can be clearly and uniquely identified within the relevant competition. If a listed team name has no reasonable connection to any participating team, or if it matches or could reasonably refer to another team in the same competition such that the intended team cannot be unambiguously determined, this market will resolve 50-50.

eventMetadata.context_description: Karmine Corp enters this LEC regular season BO3 undefeated at 6-0 series record, sitting second behind Team Vitality with dominant wins over top teams like Vitality, NAVI, and Fnatic, showcasing superior macro and early skirmish control that defines trader consensus. Movistar KOI holds a competitive 4-2 mark after a gritty 2-1 upset over Shifters last week, clinching their top-6 playoff spot despite prior losses to Vitality and Shifters, bolstered by Elyoya's jungle aggression and Supa's ADC carry potential. No roster changes or subs reported; both squads at full strength on the current patch favoring objective-focused play. Head-to-head history is split from prior splits, heightening upset risk in this standings-shifting matchup.

markets.question: Will Doja Cat have a #1 song on the Billboard Hot 100 in 2026?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to “Yes” if any song by the listed artist is the number 1 song in any official weekly Billboard Hot 100 songs chart released for a data collection reference period entirely between January 1 and December 31, 2026. Otherwise, this market will resolve to “No”.

Any song released with the listed artist as a primary artist will count, including songs released before 2026. If a song is released jointly by multiple artists credited equally as primary artists, it will count for all of them. Features, writing credits, production credits, or other forms of non-primary contributions to a song will not count. Artist attribution will be determined solely by the artists displayed by Billboard on the relevant chart.

Billboard updates its Hot 100 songs chart each Tuesday (with adjusted release schedules on some holiday weeks), reflecting data collected in the previous week (Friday-Thursday). Each Billboard chart is then titled “Week of (date of the upcoming Saturday)”. The first Billboard Hot 100 song chart relevant to this market will be the chart titled “Week of January 17, 2026” for a data collection reference period of January 2-8, 2026. The final Billboard Hot 100 song chart relevant to this market will be the Chart titled “Week of January 9, 2027” for a data collection reference period of December 25-31, 2026.

Updates or revisions made within this market’s timeframe to the #1-ranked song on previously published Billboard Hot 100 charts will be considered; however, such updates will not disqualify a previously published Billboard Hot 100 #1 song from counting. If a Billboard Hot 100 #1 song is revised after initial publication, both the originally published #1 song and the revised #1 song will count for this market. Updates or revisions made after the release of the final Billboard Hot 100 song chart relevant to this market will not be considered.

The resolution source for this market will be the weekly Billboard Hot 100 songs charts published each week at https://www.billboard.com/charts/hot-100/ and through other official Billboard channels.

eventMetadata.context_description: Ella Langley's "Choosin' Texas" reclaimed the Billboard Hot 100 summit for an eighth non-consecutive week on the May 9 chart, underscoring country crossover dominance via massive streaming and airplay gains amid viral TikTok traction. This follows Olivia Rodrigo's one-week stint at #1 with "Drop Dead," marking her as the eighth unique artist to top the chart in 2026 so far—joining Taylor Swift (two #1s), Bruno Mars, Harry Styles, Bad Bunny, BTS, and Mariah Carey's holiday re-entry. With half the year remaining, trader sentiment hinges on summer single drops from powerhouses like Drake or potential surprise collabs, as weekly Tuesday updates track streaming surges, sales, and radio to crown year-end achievers.

markets.question: Will Trump praise Shehbaz Sharif by May 31, 2026?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if Donald Trump publicly praises the listed individual between market creation and the specified date (ET). Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

A qualifying statement includes any remark by Trump that expresses approval, admiration, respect, or endorsement of the listed individual personally or professionally. This can include direct praise (e.g., “He/She is smart,” “He’s/She's a great leader”) or equivalent positive descriptions (“impressive,” “strong,” “brilliant,” “doing a great job”) made in reference to the listed individual.

Any statement that clearly expresses approval, admiration, or endorsement of the listed individual personally qualifies for this market regardless of context (e.g., "He/She is very smart, but he/she doesn’t seem to know that this policy will harm more of his/her constituents." would qualify).

General neutrality or polite diplomatic language (e.g., “We had a good meeting”) will not qualify unless it contains a clear element of positive evaluation.

A direct reference will qualify even if the individual is not named, so long as it is reasonably clear from context that he is the subject.

Any written, verbal, or recorded usage will qualify.

The resolution source for this market will be public statements from Donald Trump.

eventMetadata.context_description: President Donald Trump's public praises in recent weeks have focused on Republican midterm candidates, including his May 1 Truth Social endorsement of Rep. Andy Barr for Kentucky's open Senate seat to succeed Mitch McConnell, alongside earlier backing for Steve Hilton in California's gubernatorial primary and others in Georgia and Indiana special elections. During King Charles III's early May state visit, Trump commended the monarch as a "high quality person" delivering a "fantastic speech" to Congress. Truth Social posts amid the Iran war invoke "Praise be to Allah" for U.S. victories, while AI religious imagery and criticism of Pope Leo XIV fuel debate. Traders eye potential nods to nominees like Kash Patel, allies such as Karoline Leavitt, or foreign leaders including Benjamin Netanyahu and Shehbaz Sharif before the May 31 deadline.

markets.question: Will Steve Witkoff attend the next US x Iran diplomatic meeting?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if the listed individual attends the next diplomatic meeting between representatives of the United States and Iran by June 30, 2026, 11:59 PM ET. Otherwise, this market will resolve to “No”.

A diplomatic meeting refers to a deliberate meeting between representatives of the listed countries who are acting in an official capacity and are authorized to engage in negotiation or diplomacy regarding US-Iranian relations on behalf of their governments. Meetings conducted indirectly, for example, through designated mediators, facilitators, or interlocutors acting with the knowledge and authorization of the relevant governments, will qualify.

Brief greetings, chance encounters, or talks otherwise not deliberately aimed at diplomacy or negotiation will not qualify as diplomatic meetings.

The meeting must be in-person (including indirect in-person meetings) and must be publicly acknowledged by either government or reported by a consensus of credible media. Remote meetings, phone calls, or other meetings where the relevant parties are not present will not count.

Attendance refers to the listed individual being physically present and actively participating in negotiations at the meeting.

If the next diplomatic meeting between representatives of the United States and Iran takes place over multiple days, attendance at any part of the meeting will qualify.

The primary resolution source for this market will be official information from the listed individual and the governments of the United States and Iran; however, a consensus of credible reporting will also be used.

eventMetadata.context_description: Following a two-week ceasefire on April 8 ending the 2026 US-Iran war, initial direct talks in Islamabad, Pakistan, around April 10—led by US Vice President JD Vance alongside envoys Steve Witkoff and Jared Kushner, facing Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi and Parliament Speaker Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf—failed to yield a comprehensive deal amid disputes over the Strait of Hormuz and nuclear issues. Negotiations have resumed indirectly, with Witkoff confirming momentum as of May 3, and reports on May 6 indicating proximity to a one-page memorandum outlining war termination and future talks. No date or attendees for the next meeting are confirmed, though Pakistan remains the favored neutral venue; traders monitor diplomatic signals, Israeli positions, and potential G7 discussions on May 14-15 where US Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent flagged Iran.

events.title: Fluminense FC vs. São Paulo FC
events.description: This event is for the upcoming Brazil Série A game, scheduled for Saturday, May 16, 2026 between Fluminense FC and São Paulo FC.

eventMetadata.context_description: Fluminense holds a slim trader consensus edge at 49% implied probability for the Serie A showdown at Maracanã against fourth-placed São Paulo (44%), with draw pricing at 43.5% signaling high uncertainty in this table-topping battle. Widespread injuries plague both squads, offsetting Fluminense's home advantage and strong recent form (7 wins in 12 matches): key absences include Germán Cano (knee), Lucho Acosta, and Soteldo for the hosts, while visitors miss Lucas Moura, Pablo Maia, Calleri (concussion protocol), and Luciano (overload). Balanced head-to-head history—capped by Fluminense's 6-0 thrashing in November 2025—combined with São Paulo's resilient away resilience keeps the matchup tightly contested amid mutual roster disruptions over the past month.

Sharif Street at 60.5% implied probability, driven by his commanding establishment endorsements from Philadelphia Democratic leaders, former party chair role, and family political legacy, bolstering machine turnout in this deep-blue open seat race to replace retiring Rep. Dwight Evans. State Rep. State Rep. Ala Stanford's 3.1% reflects fading momentum after her last-minute withdrawal from a late-April WHYY debate and earlier TV ad visibility, with the May 19 primary looming as the key test of voter turnout among key blocs.

Trader consensus reflects Auckland's home advantage and competitive head-to-head history—featuring recent 1-1 and 2-2 draws—but tempers it with the hosts' injury crisis: Golden Boot co-winner Sam Cosgrove (ankle ligaments) and Jesse Randall are major doubts, alongside lingering concerns for Jake Brimmer (calf) and goalkeeper Michael Woud (groin). Adelaide enters healthier, riding a strong finish that saw them stun Melbourne City late in the campaign, setting up a tight aggregate contest ahead of the May 15 return leg.

eventMetadata.context_description: US State Department confirmation of intensive direct talks between Israel and Lebanon on May 14-15 in Washington has solidified trader consensus at 94.5% Yes for a diplomatic meeting by May 31, representing the third round in ongoing US-mediated negotiations. These build on April's historic first face-to-face discussions—since 1983—and a subsequent extension of the April 16 ceasefire amid the 2026 Israel-Lebanon hostilities, involving Israeli Ambassador Yechiel Leiter, Lebanese Ambassador Nada Hamadeh, and Secretary Marco Rubio. While low risks like escalation or Hezbollah actions persist, official scheduling and prior progress reflect the wisdom of crowds pricing in high likelihood of continuation.
